title: Happy 90th Birthday Banner (2.7m x 13cm) • Holographic Foil Party Decoration for Age 90 Celebrations • Glitter Garland in Sparkling Blue • Banners for Indoor & Outdoor
features: NINETY YEARS. ONE REMARKABLE CELEBRATION – Honour an extraordinary 90th birthday with this sparkling holographic foil banner from British Ballet. At 2.7 meters long and 13 cm high, its repeating design can be split into 3 x 90cm sections. Ideal banner for decorating party spaces with elegance.

MAKE GRANDMA OR GRANDPA’S 90TH UNFORGETTABLE – Whether you’re planning a heartfelt tea for grandma or a garden gathering for grandpa, this banner brings warmth and dignity. Use it across tables, doors, windows, walls or fences or as a standout centrepiece to create treasured moments.

HOLOGRAPHIC BIRTHDAY SIGN – This sparkling foil birthday banner creates festive brilliance and joyful energy for any celebration. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, the foil sign sets the scene for milestone moments. Perfect as a glittering party backdrop, wall decoration, or table garland for family photos, toasts, and cherished memories.

REUSABLE & DURABLE DESIGN – Made of high-quality foil polyester, this banner is both lightweight and weather-resistant. It’s easy to fold, store and reuse for keepsake photos or future parties – ideal for creating lasting memories. The decorative must-haves for the next birthday party.

BRITISH BALLET – TRUSTED FAMILY BRAND – Since 2013, British Ballet has grown from a small family-run venture into one of the UK’s leading suppliers of party goods. Backed by over 40 years of combined experience, we create joyful, reliable decorations designed to make your celebrations truly memorable – always with heart and attention to detail.
